question: Among all repositories that do not use any programming language whose name (case-insensitively) includes the substring "python," what is the proportion of files whose paths include "readme.md" and whose contents contain the phrase "Copyright (c)"?
temp_SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "SAMPLE_FILES" f JOIN "LANGUAGES" l ON f."repo_name" = l."repo_name" WHERE f."path" ILIKE '%readme.md%' AND l."language" IS NULL; /* Count 'readme.md' files in repositories without any programming language */
final_SQL: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "SAMPLE_FILES" f JOIN "LANGUAGES" l ON f."repo_name" = l."repo_name" WHERE f."path" ILIKE '%readme.md%' AND l."language" IS NULL; /* Count 'readme.md' files in repositories without any programming language */
